product_overview: JAZ is a web platform for managing events, registrations, partners, training programs, and operational workflows through a public website and an admin dashboard. It lets visitors explore services and lets administrators sign in to manage platform content and operational data.
core_goals: Let visitors browse the public landing page and learn about the platform’s services and focus areas.
Allow administrators to sign in and access the operations dashboard.
Support centralized management of events, registrations, content, partners, users, and system settings through the admin dashboard.
Enable operational teams to review and process event participation cases across the platform's workflows.
Provide tools for team coordination, passport data review, and creative prompt generation for event promotion.

features.name: Landing Page Viewer
features.description: Visitors can browse the public homepage to view the hero section, services, and active focus domains.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through services -> Check focus domains -> View the landing page content

features.name: Administrator Login
features.description: Administrators can sign in with email and password to access the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin-login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the dashboard

routes.description: Landing Page showing services and focus domains.
Administrator Sign In page to operations hub.
